case_title: SERENE ZLOOF VS. DONNA JOHNSON et al

docket_entries.description: HEARING. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON MAR-04-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-02-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-18-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR GARRY JOHN HUBERT APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION JUN-27-2003 THROUGH SEP-25-2003.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON JAN-16-2004 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. FOR JUDGMENT, DISMISSAL OR TRIAL DE NOVO. OCT-27-2003 ARBITRATION OSC IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (DEFT ACTUALLY FILED THE DOCUMENT AND THE LAW FIRM REPRESENTING THE PLTF SIGNED OFF ON THE DOCUMENT) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZLOOF, SERENE AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, DONNA
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZLOOF, SERENE JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 7.0 DAYS
AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR
ARBETRATER'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR GARRY J.D. HUBERT

PERSONAL INJURY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZLOOF, SERENE AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, DONNA DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-18-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-13-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-03-2003
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR MAR-04-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR JOHN PAUL WALOVICH.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-27-2003 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT JOHNSON, DONNA
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR JUN-16-2003. JUN-02-2003 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZLOOF, SERENE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, DONNA $5,039.20 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,039.20, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-16-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE JUN-26-2003.
